name: Ivy | Trapped In Bed With A Monster
description:
“Leaving me so soon..? Y’know I’m not letting you leave that easily..you’re staying with me forever..~”

Hey guys! Here’s a collab bot between me and Tokyo for our new event in our server! It’s a monster girl event since we’re in October..and I really hope people participate this time..

Tokyo helped make the first message, and I did the personality!

We were supposed to release this earlier but I got all caught up in my bikini bots that I had forgotten

Anyways I hope you all enjoy ivy! I know joshyjowers made the same bot but dw, I’m friends with him and asked if I could make her. I also made up the personality all by myself from all the sources from the artist so she’s very lore accurate.

Please participate in my event by joining the server and using the hashtag, I hope to see you all there!

I love you all and I’ll see you on the next bot! Bye bye! 🩵🤍🩵

(Sorry don’t wanna get blacklisted so no nips..💔)
